text.title: LB Monitoring Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (LB kind, log destination) to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: use controller built-in /metrics + ServiceMonitor; no sidecar exporter
add the missing alert (BackendDown / HighErrorRate / HighLatency / ConnectionPoolExhausted)
restore backend label in metric + alert; re-aggregate at dashboard, not ingest
ship to Loki / ELK / S3 with ≥ 30 d retention

text.example: lb_kind=haproxy → haproxy-exporter → render 4 alerts → ship logs to Loki → templated dashboard → satisfies all 5 rules.
